⤑ Bot Issues

⤑ Feedback & Comments

I’m fine with feedback, so please feel free to comment. However—negative, rude, or hurtful comments will be deleted and you’ll be blocked.

⤑ Requests

The link to my requests are at the end of this page. If you do put in a request, it won’t be asap or guaranteed I’ll make it. I also don’t go in order.
